Our Menu

Welcome to Food, LLC

We are a family-owned restaurant dedicated to bringing you the finest meals crafted from locally sourced, seasonal ingredients. Our chefs have decades of experience creating dishes that delight every palate. Whether you are joining us for a quick lunch, a romantic dinner, or a large group celebration, we promise an unforgettable dining experience.

Chicken

Our chicken dishes are prepared fresh daily using free-range poultry sourced from local farms. From crispy fried chicken to slow-roasted herb-glazed half chickens, every bite is packed with flavor. We marinate for 24 hours to ensure maximum tenderness and taste. Served with your choice of sides including seasonal vegetables, mashed potatoes, or garden salad. Come in and try our legendary honey-garlic chicken wings — a crowd favorite since 2009! We also offer a spicy buffalo option for those who enjoy an extra kick. Our chefs are constantly experimenting with new recipes to keep the menu fresh and exciting. Ask your server about today's special chicken preparation. Back to Top

Beef

We take beef seriously. Our cuts are sourced exclusively from USDA-certified farms and aged to perfection before they ever reach your plate. Whether you prefer a classic cheeseburger stacked high with fresh toppings, a slow-braised short rib falling off the bone, or a sizzling ribeye steak cooked to your exact specification, we have something for every beef lover. Each dish is seasoned with our proprietary spice blend developed over years of culinary refinement. Our beef stew is slow-cooked for eight hours to produce a deep rich broth that warms the soul. Don't miss our Wagyu sliders available only on weekends. Pair any beef dish with our craft sauces made in-house every morning. Back to Top

Sushi

Our sushi menu is crafted by a classically trained Japanese chef with over 15 years of experience in Tokyo and New York. We use only sushi-grade fish delivered fresh every morning directly from the docks. Choose from an extensive selection of nigiri, sashimi, maki rolls, and our signature specialty rolls created right here at Food, LLC. The Dragon Roll, Rainbow Roll, and our famous Volcano Roll are customer favorites. For the adventurous, try the Omakase experience — let the chef surprise you with a curated selection of the finest pieces available that day. We also offer vegetarian and vegan sushi options that are just as creative and delicious. Premium sake and Japanese whisky pairings available upon request. Reservations recommended for the Omakase experience.
